<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no">

    <meta name="description" content="Global Reach - Responsive Media generates leads for clients from all over the world!">
    <meta name="distribution" content="Global">

    <title>Responsive Media - Performance Marketing Agency</title>

    <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.rmads.com/">

    <link href="/css/bootstrap.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
		
<style>

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* LOCAL FONTS
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

/* Lato light */

@font-face {
	font-family: "Lato";
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Light.eot);
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Light.eot?#iefix) format('embedded-opentype'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Light.woff2) format('woff2'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Light.woff) format('woff'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Light.ttf) format('truetype');
	font-weight: 300;
	font-style: normal;
}

/* Lato regular */

@font-face {
	font-family: "Lato";
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Regular.eot);
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Regular.eot?#iefix) format('embedded-opentype'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Regular.woff2) format('woff2'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Regular.woff) format('woff'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Regular.ttf) format('truetype');
	font-weight: 400;
	font-style: normal;
}

/* Lato bold */

@font-face {
	font-family: "Lato";
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Bold.eot);
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Bold.eot?#iefix) format('embedded-opentype'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Bold.woff2) format('woff2'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Bold.woff) format('woff'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Bold.ttf) format('truetype');
	font-weight: 700;
	font-style: normal;
}

/* Lato black */

@font-face {
	font-family: "Lato";
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Black.eot);
	src: url(/fonts/Lato-Black.eot?#iefix) format('embedded-opentype'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Black.woff2) format('woff2'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Black.woff) format('woff'),
			 url(/fonts/Lato-Black.ttf) format('truetype');
	font-weight: 900;
	font-style: normal;
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* BODY & GENERAL STYLES
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

html, body {
	position: relative;
	height: 100%;
}

body {
	font-family: "Lato", sans-serif;
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 300;
	color: #f2f2f2;
	background: #273238;
}

h1.display-1 {
	font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 900;
}

h1 {
	font-size: 1.75rem;
	font-weight: 400;
}

h2 {
	font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

h3 {
	font-size: 1.25rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

h4 {
	font-size: 1.125rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

p, ul {
	font-size: 1.125rem;
	line-height: 160%;
}

#legal p, #legal ul {
	font-size: 1rem;
}


strong,
.font-weight-bold {
	font-weight: 700;
}

a {
	color: #ffffff;
	text-decoration: underline;
	transition: color .15s ease-in-out;
}

a:focus,
a:hover,
a:focus.hover {
	color: #b1cd35;
}

.btn-primary {
	background: #ffffff;
	color: #1a1a1a;
	font-weight: 900;
	border-radius: 2px;
	border: none;
}

.btn-primary:hover,
.btn-primary:focus,
.btn-primary:active,
.btn-primary.active.focus,
.btn-primary.active:focus,
.btn-primary.active:hover,
.btn-primary:active.focus,
.btn-primary:active:focus,
.btn-primary:active:hover,
.btn-primary:not(:disabled):not(.disabled).active,
.btn-primary:not(:disabled):not(.disabled):active {
	background: #b1cd35;
	color: #1a1a1a;
}

/* .btn-primary:not(:disabled):not(.disabled).active:focus,
.btn-primary:not(:disabled):not(.disabled):active:focus {
    box-shadow: none;
} */

.btn-secondary {
	background: #273238;
	color: #f2f2f2;
	font-weight: 700;
	border-radius: 2px;
	border: none;
}

.btn-secondary:hover,
.btn-secondary:focus,
.btn-secondary:active,
.btn-secondary.active.focus,
.btn-secondary.active:focus,
.btn-secondary.active:hover,
.btn-secondary:active.focus,
.btn-secondary:active:focus,
.btn-secondary:active:hover {
	background: #b1cd35;
	color: #f2f2f2;
}

.h-border {
  display: inline-block;
  border: 5px solid white;
  padding: .5em 1em;
}

@media (min-width: 576px) and (min-height: 360px) {
	h1.display-1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
}

@media (min-width: 768px) and (min-height: 400px) {
	h1.display-1 { font-size: 4rem; }
	h1 { font-size: 2.25rem; }
	h2 { font-size: 1.75rem	}
	h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; }
	h4 { font-size: 1.25rem; }
}

@media (min-width: 992px) and (min-height: 400px) {
	h1.display-1 { font-size: 6rem; }
	h1 { font-size: 2.5rem; }
	h2 { font-size: 2rem;	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* HEADER & MENU
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

.navbar {
	background-color: #303e45;
	box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);
	transition: background-color .5s;
}

.navbar .container {
	position: relative;
}

.navbar-brand img {
	height: 55px;
}

.navbar-toggler {
	font-size: 1.25rem;
	border: 0 !important;
	padding-right: 0;
}

.navbar-dark .navbar-toggler-icon {
	background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg viewBox='0 0 30 30' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3e%3cpath stroke='rgba(242, 242, 242, 1)' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-miterlimit='10' d='M4 7h22M4 15h22M4 23h22'/%3e%3c/svg%3e");
}

.lng-menu img {
	opacity: .8;
	transition: box-shadow .5s;
}

.lng-menu img:focus,
.lng-menu img:hover {
	opacity: 1;
}

#lp .lng-menu img {
	box-shadow: 0px 0px 50px 0px rgba(255,255,255,1);
}

.nav-link {
	font-size: .75em;
	font-weight: 400;
  padding: 5px 10px !important;
  color: #ffffff !important;
	border: 2px solid transparent;
	text-decoration: none;
	transition: border 0.25s;
}

.navbar-dark .navbar-nav .nav-link:focus,
.navbar-dark .navbar-nav .nav-link:hover,
.navbar-nav .active>.nav-link,
.navbar-nav .nav-link.active,
.navbar-nav .nav-link.show,
.navbar-nav .show>.nav-link {
  border: 2px solid white;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
	.navbar-brand img { height: 60px; }
}

@media (min-width: 992px) {
	.navbar {
		background-color: transparent;
		box-shadow: 0px 0px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.0);
	}
	.lng-menu img {
		width: 30px;
		height: auto;
	}
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
	.navbar-brand img { height: 65px; }
	.lng-menu img { width: 35px; }
	.nav-link {
		font-size: .875em;
		padding: 10px 15px !important;
	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* HERO SLIDER
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

.carousel-item {
	height: 100vh;
	background: url(/img/hero.jpg?010) no-repeat center center;
	-webkit-background-size: cover;
	-moz-background-size: cover;
	-o-background-size: cover;
	background-size: cover;
}

@media (min-height: 520px) {
	.carousel-caption {
		transform: translateY(-50%);
		bottom: auto;
		top: 50%;
	}
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
	.carousel-caption h1:nth-of-type(2) {
		width: 75%;
		margin: 0 auto;
	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* SERVICES SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#services2 {
	background: #36444d;
}

#services2 .front, #services2 .back {
	background-color: #273238;
}


.flip-container {
	perspective: 1000px;
}

.flip-card {
	transform: rotateY(-180deg);
	transition: 0.5s;
	transform-style: preserve-3d;
	position: relative;
}

.front, .back {
	background-color: #303e45;
	backface-visibility: hidden;
	width: 100%;
	border-bottom: 5px solid #b1cd35;
}

.flip-container:nth-child(odd) .front,
.flip-container:nth-child(odd) .back {
	border-bottom: 5px solid #2166a9;
}

.front {
	z-index: 2;
	/* for firefox 31 */
	transform: rotateY(0deg);
}

.back {	transform: rotateY(180deg); }

.back p {
	font-size: .95em;
	line-height: 140%;
}

.front img,
.back img { height: 60px; }

.front-container {
  position: relative;
  top: 50%;
  -webkit-transform: translate(0px, -50%);
  -moz-transform: translate(0px, -50%);
  transform: translate(0px, -50%);
	height: 120px;
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
	.flip-card { transform: rotateY(0deg); }
	.front, .back {
		position: absolute;
		top: 0;
		left: 0;
		border-bottom: 10px solid #b1cd35;
	}

	.flip-container:hover .flip-card,
	.flip-container.hover .flip-card { transform: rotateY(-180deg);	}
	.flip-container, .front, .back { height: 260px;	}
	.flip-container:nth-child(odd) .front,
	.flip-container:nth-child(odd) .back {
		border-bottom: 10px solid #2166a9;
	}
}

@media (min-width: 992px) {
	.flip-container, .front, .back { height: 300px;	}
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
	.flip-container, .front, .back { height: 240px;	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* ABOUT SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#about {
	background: url(/img/bg-about.jpg?010) no-repeat center center;
	-webkit-background-size: cover;
	-moz-background-size: cover;
	-o-background-size: cover;
	background-size: cover;
}

@media (min-width: 992px) {
	#about p { width: 75%;	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* MARKETS SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#markets ul {
	list-style-type: none;
	padding: 0;
}

#markets li:before {
	content: "▸";
	margin-right: 3px;
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* PARTNERS SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#partners {
	background: #36444d;
}

#google,
#facebook,
#microsoft,
#yahoo,
#bing {
	transition: background-image .25s;
}

#google {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 184px 60px;
	width: 184px;
	height: 60px;
}

#google:hover,
#google:focus {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 184px 60px;
}

#facebook {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 204px 40px;
	width: 204px;
	height: 60px;
}

#facebook:hover,
#facebook:focus {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 204px 40px;
}

#microsoft {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 190px 60px;
	width: 190px;
	height: 60px;
}

#microsoft:hover,
#microsoft:focus {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 190px 60px;
}

#yahoo {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 180px 35px;
	width: 180px;
	height: 60px;
}

#yahoo:hover,
#yahoo:focus {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 180px 35px;
}

#bing {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 120px 45px;
	width: 120px;
	height: 60px;
}

#bing:hover,
#bing:focus {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat center;
	background-size: 120px 45px;
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* JOBS SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#jobs {
	background: url(/img/bg-jobs.jpg) no-repeat center center;
	-webkit-background-size: cover;
	-moz-background-size: cover;
	-o-background-size: cover;
	background-size: cover;
}

#jobs .accordion .card {
	background-color: transparent;
}

#jobs .accordion .card-header {
    background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, .05);
}

#jobs .accordion .btn-link {
	color: #ffffff;
}

@media (min-width: 992px) {
	#jobs p { width: 75%;	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* CONTACT SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#contact {
	background: url(/img/bg-contact.jpg) no-repeat center center;
	-webkit-background-size: cover;
	-moz-background-size: cover;
	-o-background-size: cover;
	background-size: cover;
}

.lead {
	font-weight: 400;
}

.alert {
	color: #fff !important;
	border: none;
	border-radius: 2px !important;
}

.alert-danger {
	background-color: rgba(215, 19, 21, 0.25);
}

.alert-success {
	background-color: rgba(177, 205, 53, 0.25);
}

#contact .form-control {
	color: #f2f2f2 !important;
	background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
	border: none;
	border-radius: 2px !important;
}

::-webkit-input-placeholder {
  color: rgba(242, 242, 242, 0.5) !important;
}
::-moz-placeholder {
  color: rgba(242, 242, 242, 0.5) !important;
}
:-ms-input-placeholder {
  color: rgba(242, 242, 242, 0.5) !important;
}
::placeholder {
  color: rgba(242, 242, 242, 0.5) !important;
}

#contact-info div {
	background-color: #273238;
	min-height: 65px;
}

#contact-info span { font-size: .875em;	}

#icon-address {
	width: auto;
	height: 20px;
}

#icon-phone {
	width: auto;
	height: 20px;
}

#icon-mail {
	width: 20px;
	height: auto;
}

@media (min-width: 992px) {
	#contact-info div {	min-height: 78px;	}
	#contact-info span { font-size: 1em;	}
	#icon-address {	height: 30px;	}
	#icon-phone {	height: 30px;	}
	#icon-mail { width: 30px;	}
}

@media (min-width: 1200px) {
	#contact form,
	#contact-info { width: 75%;	}
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* FOOTER SECTION
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

footer {
	background: #1a1a1a;
}

.social {
	cursor: pointer;
	width: 30px;
	height: 30px;
}

#social-fb {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat;
	background-position: 0 0;
	background-size: 60px 30px;
}

#social-fb:hover,
#social-fb:focus {
	background-position: -30px 0;
}

#social-ln {
	background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat;
	background-position: 0 0;
	background-size: 60px 30px;
}

#social-ln:hover,
#social-ln:focus {
	background-position: -30px 0;
}

/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */
/* OVERRIDE COOKIE NOTICE STYLES
/* ----------------------------------------------------------- */

#cookie-notice {
	position: fixed;
	bottom: 0px;
	left: 0px;
	right: 0px;
	z-index: 999;
	background: #273238;
	font-size: .75em !important;
	-webkit-box-shadow: 0px -1px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
	-moz-box-shadow: 0px -1px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
	box-shadow: 0px -1px 10px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}

</style>

    <div id="services" class="text-center py-5">
			<div class="container my-sm-5">
				<h2 class="h-border text-uppercase mb-5">What We Do</h2>
				<div class="row">
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mb-3">
						<div class="flip-card">
							<div class="front d-none d-md-block">

									<img class="mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
									<h3 class="text-uppercase">Strategy</h3>
								</div>
							</div>
							<div class="back p-3">
								<img class="d-md-none mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
								<h3 class="text-uppercase">Strategy</h3>
								<p class="m-0">Our experience enables us to create a marketing strategy that not only fits your marketing budget but also your customers’ needs. After extensive research we will provide you with an in-depth overview of all relevant channels and how to effectively utilize them.</p>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mb-3">
						<div class="flip-card">
							<div class="front d-none d-md-block">
								<div class="front-container">
									<img class="mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
									<h3 class="text-uppercase">Tracking</h3>
								</div>
							</div>
							<div class="back p-3">
								<img class="d-md-none mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
								<h3 class="text-uppercase">Tracking</h3>
								<p class="m-0">Our custom-made tracking tools enable us to consistently optimize your campaigns and provide you with a real time overview of all your channels - maximizing the ROI and keeping your business on track for whatever goal you might have set out.</p>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mb-3 mt-md-3 mt-lg-0">
						<div class="flip-card">
							<div class="front d-none d-md-block">
								<div class="front-container align-bottom">
	                <img class="mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
									<h3 class="text-uppercase">Advertising</h3>
								</div>
							</div>
							<div class="back p-3">
								<img class="d-md-none mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
								<h3 class="text-uppercase">Advertising</h3>
								<p class="m-0">We love Advertising and have the experience and knowledge to optimize your campaigns to yield the best possible ROI. We acquire valuable information as we measure your campaigns, and thus able to find the best advertising placements for your business.</p>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mb-3 mt-md-3 mb-lg-0">
						<div class="flip-card">
							<div class="front d-none d-md-block">
								<div class="front-container">
									<img class="mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
									<h3 class="text-uppercase">Design</h3>
								</div>
							</div>
							<div class="back p-3">
								<img class="d-md-none mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
								<h3 class="text-uppercase">Design</h3>
								<p class="m-0">We are able to provide you with the right creatives and landing pages for your online marketing campaign. All our landing pages are optimized for desktop and mobile traffic for maximum usability and minimal load time. This way we can guarantee the highest possible conversion rates for your business.</p>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mb-3 mt-md-3 mb-md-0">
						<div class="flip-card">
							<div class="front d-none d-md-block">
								<div class="front-container">
									<img class="mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
									<h3 class="text-uppercase">Development</h3>
								</div>
							</div>
							<div class="back p-3">
								<img class="d-md-none mb-3" src="data:image/png;base64,">
								<h3 class="text-uppercase">Development</h3>
								<p class="m-0">In our daily work, we use the latest technologies coded by our in-house development team. For example, the development of a custom tracking tool enabled our clients breaking down their data to find the most profitable segments.</p>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
					<div class="col-md-6 col-lg-4 flip-container mt-md-3">

    <div id="about" class="text-center py-5">
			<div class="container my-sm-5">
				<h2 class="h-border text-uppercase mb-4">About Us</h2>
				<p class="mx-auto mt-sm-4">Responsive Media was launched in December 2009 as a forward-thinking marketing agency with a focus on Performance-Based Marketing strategies and consulting. Performance-Based Marketing allows businesses to test specific marketing techniques, and to utilize only those strategies that yield positive results and ROI. By testing each marketing technique thoroughly, Responsive Media can help businesses create and tailor the most efficient marketing strategy to suit their client's needs.</p>
				<p class="mx-auto mb-0">As recently as a few years ago, businesses would spend countless dollars to advertise in newspapers, magazines, on the radio, and on television with the hopes of receiving a positive response. With the mass migration away from print-based media and television viewing patterns evolving, businesses have to change their marketing strategies. They want to get the most for their marketing dollars, and aren't looking to waste money on ineffective marketing. This is where performance based marketing enters the picture.</p>
			</div>
		</div>
